name: @ctxr/kit
description: Universal CLI for Agent Skills artifacts (Claude Code, Codex CLI, OpenCode): install, validate, update, and scaffold skills, agents, commands, rules, output-styles, and bundles under .agents/ with auto discovery mirrors at .claude/ and ~/.codex/.

scripts.test:integration: node --test tests/integration/install.test.js tests/integration/update.test.js tests/integration/remove.test.js tests/integration/list.test.js tests/integration/validate.test.js tests/integration/info.test.js tests/integration/init.test.js
